violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Can opener placed in 3-bay. Proper sanitizing procedures reviewed with PIC. New Violation. Correct By: 10/28/2025
Boxes of containers were observed stored on the floor in the kitchen. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 10/28/2025

The floor in the back storage area has an accumulation of old rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Area to be cleaned and monitored. New Violation. Correct By: 10/28/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 10/25/2023

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/25/2023

Thermometers are lacking in the all refrigeration unit(s). Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 10/25/2023

Prep sink located in the kitchen area was not in good repair(missing pipe under sink).Per interview with PIC, prep sink is not being used. A colander is used in sanitizing compartment of 3 bay sink for food prep. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/01/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the 2 door reach in coolers, freezers, shelves throughout kitchen, and prep sink have an accumulation of food residue, other debris, and /or dust. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/25/2023
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 10/25/2023

Inspector observed outside refuse area with an accumulation of trash, litter, and other debris. Refuse areas shall be kept clean as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/25/2023

The floors under/behind equipment throughout the kitchen have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/25/2023
